query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clientes) as clientes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processos) as processos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documentos) as documentos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conhecimentos) as conhecimentos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM peticoes_geradas) as peticoes;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Xc9RJjwPAzqyUN.e36368bedae0 --database 4imSnKhwnzycXmSWcGeMqe --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clientes) as clientes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processos) as processos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documentos) as documentos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conhecimentos) as conhecimentos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM peticoes_geradas) as peticoes;
